query:
INSERT INTO agents (ownerId, agentName, developerName, description, endpointUrl, capabilities, averageLatency, pricingModel, status, connectionTested, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT
  u.id,
  v.agentName,
  'AgenThinkMesh',
  v.description,
  v.endpointUrl,
  v.capabilities,
  v.avgLatencyMs,
  'free',
  'active',
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM (SELECT id FROM users LIMIT 1) u
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'Gulf Sentiment Labeler' AS agentName, 'Classifies sentiment in Arabic text with dialect detection across all 6 Gulf states. Returns label, confidence, dialect, and rationale.' AS description, 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/sentiment' AS endpointUrl, '["arabic nlp","sentiment analysis","gulf dialect","data labeling","annotation"]' AS capabilities, 2100 AS avgLatencyMs
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Arabic NER Agent', 'Extracts and classifies named entities (persons, organisations, locations, dates, monetary values) from Arabic text. Supports MSA and Gulf dialect.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/ner', '["arabic nlp","named entity recognition","ner","data labeling","annotation","entities"]', 2400
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Islamic Finance Intent Classifier', 'Classifies user intent across Islamic finance products: murabaha, sukuk, takaful, zakat, waqf, ijara. Essential for Shariah-compliant AI chatbots.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/intent', '["arabic nlp","islamic finance","intent classification","data labeling","annotation","gulf banking"]', 1900
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Arabic Legal Clause Extractor', 'Identifies, classifies, and flags clauses in Arabic contracts and regulatory documents. Supports GCC jurisdiction tagging and risk level assessment.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/legal', '["arabic nlp","legal clause extraction","contract analysis","data labeling","annotation","gcc legal"]', 2600
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Arabic Code-Switch Detector', 'Detects and annotates Arabic-English code-switching patterns common in Gulf professional communication. Classifies switch points and mixing ratio.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/codeswitch', '["arabic nlp","code switching","arabizi","data labeling","annotation","bilingual nlp"]', 1700
) v;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2dg2iR9orw75o4J.0aefcec34322 --database 7EnctkaNppkKLbjFfnH6YY --execute 
INSERT INTO agents (ownerId, agentName, developerName, description, endpointUrl, capabilities, averageLatency, pricingModel, status, connectionTested, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT
  u.id,
  v.agentName,
  'AgenThinkMesh',
  v.description,
  v.endpointUrl,
  v.capabilities,
  v.avgLatencyMs,
  'free',
  'active',
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM (SELECT id FROM users LIMIT 1) u
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'Gulf Sentiment Labeler' AS agentName, 'Classifies sentiment in Arabic text with dialect detection across all 6 Gulf states. Returns label, confidence, dialect, and rationale.' AS description, 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/sentiment' AS endpointUrl, '["arabic nlp","sentiment analysis","gulf dialect","data labeling","annotation"]' AS capabilities, 2100 AS avgLatencyMs
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Arabic NER Agent', 'Extracts and classifies named entities (persons, organisations, locations, dates, monetary values) from Arabic text. Supports MSA and Gulf dialect.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/ner', '["arabic nlp","named entity recognition","ner","data labeling","annotation","entities"]', 2400
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Islamic Finance Intent Classifier', 'Classifies user intent across Islamic finance products: murabaha, sukuk, takaful, zakat, waqf, ijara. Essential for Shariah-compliant AI chatbots.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/intent', '["arabic nlp","islamic finance","intent classification","data labeling","annotation","gulf banking"]', 1900
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Arabic Legal Clause Extractor', 'Identifies, classifies, and flags clauses in Arabic contracts and regulatory documents. Supports GCC jurisdiction tagging and risk level assessment.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/legal', '["arabic nlp","legal clause extraction","contract analysis","data labeling","annotation","gcc legal"]', 2600
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Arabic Code-Switch Detector', 'Detects and annotates Arabic-English code-switching patterns common in Gulf professional communication. Classifies switch points and mixing ratio.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/codeswitch', '["arabic nlp","code switching","arabizi","data labeling","annotation","bilingual nlp"]', 1700
) v;
